section_miscategorizations.text: Right-sided lumbar paravertebral tenderness is noted.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an objective physical exam finding documented by the clinician, not a patient-reported symptom or history detail.
Although phrased as 'reports', this is being documented as a specific tenderness location typically captured in the physical exam, not as part of the narrative symptom history.

section_miscategorizations.text: Lying on the side makes the patient feel better.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes the patient's reported symptom modulation (positional relief), which belongs in the HPI rather than in the treatment plan.
